side_effects.description: Cystic acne developed during cycles; appeared consistently in week 2 of injection cycles in same location (cheek/chin area). Resolved upon discontinuation.

protocol_notes: User completed 3 separate 6-month-spaced injection cycles. First cycle: persisted for 5 weeks before noticing issues. Cycles 2 and 3: developed cystic acne by week 2 each time. Switched to topical GHK-Cu application which worked well without skin issues. Uses custom topical blend containing GHK-Cu, Snap 8, Argireline, HA, and Matrixyl.
